text: 2026-06-09: CLAUDE.md updated after GCS biosample/expression promotion; final GCS validation had total_dangling_edges=0 and audit showed 8 node files / 23 edge files.
Next KG slice selected: OpenTargets disease_phenotype. It is smaller and safer than variants/enhancers, strengthens an existing relation, and now has ID normalization/stub tests before scratch merge.

2026-06-09: disease_phenotype slice promoted to gs://jouvencekb/kg/v2. GCS validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; audit remains 8/15 node files and 23/77 edge files, totals 3,203,188 nodes and 25,030,503 edges.
Final TxGNN model smoke test constraint recorded in CLAUDE.md: run on VPS with at most 2 CPU / 4G RAM, tiny model, local/scratch data only, no production GCS mutation.
Next Ralph cycle: pharmacogenomics. Patch adds mutation/molecule endpoint stubs so mutation_affects_molecule_response can be validated without full variant ingest.

2026-06-09: pharmacogenomics slice promoted to GCS. Added 2,429 mutation nodes and 4,866 mutation_affects_molecule_response edges; final validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; audit 9/15 nodes and 24/77 edges.

2026-06-09: drug_molecule slice promoted to GCS. Enriched nodes/molecule.parquet with 22,230 OpenTargets ChEMBL records and 19,100 DrugBank IDs; final validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; totals unchanged at 3,205,619 nodes and 25,035,369 edges.

2026-06-09: target+GO slice found OT 26.03 schema drift: go term names are label, not name. Code/test fixed, but full scratch ingest remains CPU-bound/too slow and was stopped before validation/promotion. No GCS target+GO promotion.

2026-06-09: target+GO slice promoted to GCS after optimizing no-evidence dedup_edges. Added OpenTargets 26.03 target IDs and GO term/pathway_contains_gene merge; final validate PASS with 3,233,849 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

2026-06-09: after target+GO merge, selected protein endpoint conflation as next Ralph task. Existing protein-named GCS edge files use gene endpoints; interaction/MoA should not be blindly ingested until this is documented/resolved.
